+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "surrealdb-1810-bug-very-slow-insert-of-large-json-data-500kb",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "surrealdb: Bug: very slow insert of large json data (~500kb)",
+    "description": "Bug: very slow insert of large json data (~500kb). This issue affects 10+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify surrealdb troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your surrealdb installation:
```bash
surreal version
surreal is-ready
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review surrealdb configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant surrealdb configuration:
### Describe the bug

Storing a large json (~500kb) using python client, db.create, takes  ~4 minutes per creation/insert."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Bug: very slow insert of large json data (~500kb)",
+        "description": "Thank you for submitting this pull request! We appreciate you spending the time to work on these changes.

## What is the motivation?

JSON parsing is slower than desired and it will be useful to benchmark future solutions to the problem.

## What does this change do?

- Adds a manually-run
```yaml
from surrealdb import Surreal
import json
import asyncio
from time import time
from pathlib import Path
import requests


async def main():
    example_match_id = 6024838299
    match = requests.get(
        f"https://api.opendota.com/api/matches/{example_match_id}"
    ).json()
    print("match retrieved")
    start = time()
    async with Surreal("ws://localhost:8000/rpc") as db:
        await db.signin({"user": "root", "pass": "root"})
        await db.use("dota", "dota")
        print(len(json.dumps(match, indent=4, sort_keys=True)))
        assert isinstance(match, dict)
        await db.
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Bug: very slow insert of large json data (~500kb) is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test surrealdb to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Thank you for submitting this pull request! We appreciate you spending the time to work on these changes.

## What is the motivation?

JSON parsing is slower than desired and it will be useful to benchmark future solutions to the problem.

## What does this change do?

- Adds a manually-run benchmark test to the JSON parser.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "from surrealdb import Surreal
import json
import asyncio
from time import time
from pathlib import Path
import requests


async def main():
    example_match_id = 6024838299
    match = requests.get(
        f"https://api.opendota.com/api/matches/{example_match_id}"
    ).json()
    print("match retrieved")
    start = time()
    async with Surreal("ws://localhost:8000/rpc") as db:
        await db.signin({"user": "root", "pass": "root"})
        await db.use("dota", "dota")
        print(len(json.dumps(match, indent=4, sort_keys=True)))
        assert isinstance(match, dict)
        await db.create("match", match)
    print(f"Done in {time() - start} seconds")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    asyncio.run(main())",
+        "> python sync_surrealdb.py
match retrieved
576441
Done in 255.02334094047546 seconds",
+        "RETURN { a: { b: { c: { d: { e: { f: { g: { h: { i: { j: { k: 0 } } } } } } } } } } };"
+      ]
+    }
